While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is increased by 60% and the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is reduced by 20%.

While under the effect of **Umbral Ice**, 5,000 MP is recovered upon landing an **Ice** spell and the potency of **Fire** spells is reduced by 20%.

While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is increased by 80%, and the cast time of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is halved and potency lowered by 30%.
While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, 10,000 MP is recovered upon landing an <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spell, and the cast time of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is halved and potency lowered by 30%.

While under the effect of **Umbral Ice III**, 10,000 MP is recovered upon landing an **Ice** spell, and the cast time of **Fire** spells is halved and potency lowered by 30%.

The marker is made active after reaching <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> then swapping to the opposite element. Conversely, the marker can also be made active after reaching <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and gaining 3 <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Hearts<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> then swapping to the opposite element. The marker is made inactive when the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> expires.
<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Blizzard<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> become <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> when the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> marker is made active.

Adds a **Paradox** marker to your **Elemental Gauge**.
The marker is made active after reaching **Astral Fire III** then swapping to the opposite element. Conversely, the marker can also be made active after reaching **Umbral Ice III** and gaining 3 **Umbral Hearts** then swapping to the opposite element. The marker is made inactive when the effect of **Astral Fire** or **Umbral Ice** expires.
**Fire** and **Blizzard** become **Paradox** when the **Paradox** marker is made active.
